title: androsace vitaliana var. assoana
intro: Androsace vitaliana var. assoana, also known as the Asso's Rock-jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the primrose family, native to the southwestern Alps of France. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Asso's Rock-jasmine include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Asso's Rock-jasmine can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
